title: Spanforge ConsentPayload
description: RFC-0001 — Payload for consent.* events. Tracks data-subject consent grants, revocations, and boundary violations for GDPR Art. 6/7 compliance and EU AI Act user-rights obligations. Event types: consent.granted, consent.revoked, consent.violation.

ConsentPayload.title: ConsentPayload
ConsentPayload.description: Payload for consent.granted, consent.revoked, and consent.violation events. Captures data-subject consent state for GDPR Art. 22/25 and EU AI Act Art. 14 compliance.

subject_id.description: Identifier of the data subject whose consent is being recorded.

scope.description: Scope of the consent — what processing activity is consented to.

purpose.description: Purpose of the data processing covered by this consent.

legal_basis.description: GDPR Art. 6 lawful basis for processing. Defaults to 'consent'.

expiry.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the consent expires. Null means no expiry.

agent_id.description: Agent that triggered or consumed this consent record.

violation_detail.description: Description of the violation when status is 'violation'.
examples: Processing occurred after consent was revoked

data_categories.description: Categories of personal data covered by this consent.
